purpose: Require owner payment email notices for every important Stripe money event.
fallback_behavior: If provider credentials are missing, write payment-email-outbox.json and mark notices queued or blocked so the dashboard exposes the issue.

github_notification_fallback.behavior: Create a GitHub issue labeled payment-alert and stripe for every tracked payment event.

secret_rule: Never commit email provider API keys or Stripe keys. Use host secrets, GitHub secrets, or local environment variables.
